_comment: OTel Demo cross-app corpus manifest. Tracks the run plans that compose the full ~135-run collection per docs5/00 §5.5.5. v1 = initial seed corpus authored 2026-06-08; expand after Phase 2 pilot.

run_plans.purpose: Phase 2 pilot — validates feature-column compatibility and L3 cascade-emergence before full collection
Baselines (no-fault windows) for the negative class

notes: This v1 manifest is the seed corpus. Once Phase 2 pilot validates feature-column compatibility and L3 cascade-emergence, expand run counts to match docs5/00 §5.5.5 targets (95 L1 + 20 L2 + 16 L3 + 4 L4 = ~135 runs).
